title: Principal Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Johnson & Johnson India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
